SEARCH
Package com.example.moogerscouncil

Class SessionCache

java.lang.Object
com.example.moogerscouncil.SessionCache
public final class SessionCache extends Object
Application-scoped in-memory cache for frequently accessed Firestore data.

Cached entries have a time-to-live (TTL). Reads check the timestamp and return null if the entry has expired, triggering a fresh fetch. Mutations (booking, cancellation, feedback) call the appropriate invalidate*() method to force the next read to go to Firestore.

Thread safety: all access happens on the main (UI) thread in this app, so no synchronization is needed.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    clearAll()
    Call on logout to wipe everything.
    List<Counselor>
    getCounselors()
    Returns the cached counselor list if still fresh, or null if expired/absent.
    static SessionCache
    getInstance()
    Returns the singleton instance.
    Counselor
    getSingleCounselor(String counselorId)
    Returns the cached single counselor if still fresh and matching the ID.
    Student
    getStudent(String uid)
    Returns the cached student if still fresh, or null if expired/absent.
    List<Appointment>
    getStudentAppointments(String studentId)
    Returns the cached appointment list if still fresh and for the same student, or null if expired/absent/wrong student.
    void
    invalidateAppointments()
    Call after a booking or cancellation to force appointment refresh.
    void
    invalidateCounselors()
    Call after profile edit to force counselor list refresh.
    void
    putCounselors(List<Counselor> counselors)
    Stores the counselor list in cache.
    void
    putSingleCounselor(String counselorId, Counselor counselor)
    Stores a single counselor in cache.
    void
    putStudent(Student student)
    Stores the student profile in cache.
    void
    putStudentAppointments(String studentId, List<Appointment> appointments)
    Stores the student appointment list in cache.

  • Method Details

    • getInstance

      public static SessionCache getInstance()
      Returns the singleton instance.

    • getStudent

      public Student getStudent(String uid)
      Returns the cached student if still fresh, or null if expired/absent.
      Parameters:
      uid - The expected student UID (guards against stale data after logout).

    • putStudent

      public void putStudent(Student student)
      Stores the student profile in cache.

      Returns the cached counselor list if still fresh, or null if expired/absent.

      Stores the counselor list in cache.

      Returns the cached appointment list if still fresh and for the same student, or null if expired/absent/wrong student.

    • putStudentAppointments

      public void putStudentAppointments(String studentId, List<Appointment> appointments)
      Stores the student appointment list in cache.

      public Counselor getSingleCounselor(String counselorId)
      Returns the cached single counselor if still fresh and matching the ID.

    • putSingleCounselor

      public void putSingleCounselor(String counselorId, Counselor counselor)
      Stores a single counselor in cache.

      Call after a booking or cancellation to force appointment refresh.

      Call after profile edit to force counselor list refresh.

      public void clearAll()
      Call on logout to wipe everything.
